title: Gaza health officials say Israeli strikes kill five

snapshot.title: Gaza health officials say Israeli strikes kill five
snapshot.description: GAZA CITY: Gaza health officials said Israeli strikes on Saturday killed five people, including four members of the same family, in the latest violence to rock the Palestinian territory despite a ceasefire. Israel and Hamas trade near-daily accusations of truce violations and the Gaza Strip remains gripped by bloodshed as progress on permanently ending the war remains stalled.
snapshot.author: AFP
snapshot.pageTitle: Gaza health officials say Israeli strikes kill five | Arab News
